title: MoreStructures
body:
A mod with more structures to Minecraft!

This will contain tons of structure soon enough.

Disclaimer: This mod is work in progress.

Supported Versions: 1.20.1

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

How to Install:

Method 1: Manual Install

1st Step: Download your version

2nd Step: Cut or Copy the mod

3rd Step: Find <name>/Appdata/Roaming/.minecraft

4th Step: Open mod folder and paste

If there is no mod folder. You may not have forge installed.

Method 2: Modrinth app

1st Step: Download and your finished!
